key_themes: SOTA algorithm achievements and new challenges
summary: The Innovation Game ($TIG), a protocol rewarding algorithmic breakthroughs via a novel optimizable proof-of-work system, is seeing strongly positive sentiment with ~24% gains in the last 24 hours to around $0.87, robust $6.6M volume, and a ~$12M market cap.[[1]](https://coinmarketcap.com/currencies/the-innovation-game/)[[1]](https://coinmarketcap.com/currencies/the-innovation-game/) Discussions highlight its elegant incentives for real innovation (not just more GPUs), recent DeSci leadership with +30-50% weekly gains, new protocol challenges, and illiquid supply that could drive sharp upside on adoption or licensing.[[2]](https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/the-innovation-game)[[3]](https://x.com/_0xghost_/status/2044576055055302807) Investors are actively rotating from related tokens like $TAO, calling it early, high-conviction, and fundamentally strong despite volatility.
sources: ~40 recent X posts (overwhelmingly bullish), CoinMarketCap, CoinGecko, and Uniswap pages, TIG Foundation official site and docs, Recent project announcements on X
